text:
Defrin also said Israel successfully intercepted all of the drones launched at it by Iran in just over two weeks of fighting, though Israeli authorities don’t disclose how many drones or missiles Iran has launched at Israel since it came under attack on Feb. 28.
The Israeli military agency that coordinates aid to Gaza, known as COGAT, said late on Sunday that the Rafah crossing would “reopen for movement in both directions starting on Wednesday.”
The crossing, which connects Gaza and Egypt and is known as a lifeline to people in Gaza, has been closed since the war with Iran began on Feb. 28, according to a spokesman for COGAT. It had just reopened earlier that month, after being largely closed for 20 months, a move that was viewed as a symbolic, if halting, step forward in Israel’s cease-fire with Hamas.
title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.

citability.title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.
